name: liquid_light_show
title: Liquid Light Show — 1960s Psychedelia
brief: Full fluid solver (Stam stable-fluids + pressure projection) with Cahn-Hilliard phase separation, Rayleigh-Bénard thermal convection, and thin-film iridescence. 1960s oil-projector psychedelia. The big one. Batch-A-tier sim.
